basics.name: Deepak Kumar Saini
basics.label: Data Analyst
basics.summary: Detail-oriented Data Analyst with hands-on experience in Python, SQL, Power BI, and Advanced Excel for data cleaning, analysis, and visualization. Proficient in data modeling, dashboard creation, and KPI tracking to support business intelligence and decision-making. Passionate about leveraging data-driven strategies to improve operational efficiency and optimize performance outcomes.

work.name: CXL Technologies
highlights: Extracted, transformed, and analyzed datasets using SQL and Power Query, improving data reliability and reporting efficiency by 30%.
Developed interactive Power BI dashboards using DAX and data modeling to visualize KPIs, enhancing decision-making accuracy by 25%.
Automated reports in Excel using Pivot Tables and advanced formulas, reducing reporting time by 35%.
Monitored data quality and optimized SQL queries, resulting in 20% faster data retrieval and improved dashboard responsiveness.

work.name: Academor
highlights: Cleaned and analyzed large datasets using Python, SQL, and Power Query, improving overall data accuracy and consistency by 25%.
Developed interactive dashboards in Power BI and Excel to visualize KPIs and trends, enhancing data-driven decision-making across teams.
Performed Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to uncover key trends and correlations, supporting data-driven decisions that optimized performance by 15%.

education.institution: Raj Kumar Goel Insitute of Technology - Ghaziabad

skills.name: Data Visualization & BI Tools
keywords: Power BI (DAX, Data Modeling, Interactive Dashboards)
Excel (Pivot Tables, Macros, VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, Power Query)

certifications.name: Advanced Certification in Full Stack Data Science & AI
SQL for Developers, Data Analysts and BI

projects.name: AMAZON PRIME VIDEO CONTENT ANALYSIS
highlights: Conducted comprehensive Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on Amazon Prime’s movies and TV shows dataset to extract meaningful business insights.
Utilized Python (Pandas, NumPy) for data cleaning and transformation, and applied Matplotlib & Seaborn for interactive data visualization and trend analysis.
Identified key patterns in genre popularity, viewer ratings, release trends, and regional content distribution, enabling data-driven recommendations for strategic decision-making.

projects.name: HOSPITAL EMERGENCY ROOM ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
highlights: Developed an interactive Hospital Emergency Room Dashboard in Excel using Pivot Tables, Slicers, and Conditional Formatting to analyze patient inflow, wait times, and admission trends.
Designed and tracked key KPIs such as total patients, average wait time, and admission rate, improving decision-making and operational efficiency.
Created dynamic data visualizations and automated filters to enable real-time performance monitoring and enhance data-driven insights for hospital management.

projects.name: HOTEL PERFORMANCE ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
highlights: Developed a comprehensive hotel performance analytics dashboard for a multi-city hotel chain covering properties in Bangalore, Delhi, Hyderabad and Mumbai.
Used Power BI, Excel, Power Query, and DAX to clean, model, and visualize key metrics like Revenue, RevPAR, ADR, and Occupancy %.
Enabled quick performance comparison by city and property type, helping identify top-performing hotels and revenue trends.
